overview: A futuristic QA Engineer portfolio website styled as a Quality Assurance System Interface. Features dark glassmorphism UI, scanning animations, typing effects, an animated QA pipeline, and structured ATS-optimized content.
features: Hero with typing animation and neon glow effects
Skills displayed as test coverage progress bars
Experience timeline styled as system logs
Projects styled as test case reports with glassmorphism
Bug counter with dynamic number animation
Fully responsive with smooth mobile animations
ATS-optimized with selectable text and semantic HTML
